payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with recessed vertical panels and visible wood grain at the right edge of the image, topped by a white countertop corner; the object is edge-cropped and shows minor wear at the countertop edge, estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.
